extDescription.message: Pick a video on the page and capture it as MP4.

activeTabUnavailable.message: Could not access the active tab.

pageUnavailable.message: The extension cannot run on this page, or no video has been detected yet.

popupDescription.message: Select a video on the page and capture it as MP4.

selectVideoOnPage.message: Select a video to record on this page

settingContinueOnResolutionChange.message: Keep recording when the resolution changes

settingContinueOnResolutionChangeDescrip.message: When a resolution change is detected, recording continues in a new file.

pickerInstructions.message: Move the pointer over the video to record

noVideosDetected.message: No videos detected. Play a video, then refresh.

captureStreamHasNoTracks.message: No video or audio is available to record. Play the video and try again.

captureStreamUnsupported.message: This browser does not support video.captureStream().

protectedVideoCaptureUnsupported.message: This video cannot be captured because it is protected by DRM or similar restrictions.

directFolderSaveUnsupported.message: This browser does not support saving directly to a folder.

videoAlreadyRecording.message: This video is already being recorded.

mediaRecorderMp4Unsupported.message: This browser does not support MP4 output from MediaRecorder.

streamingSaveUnsupported.message: This browser does not support streaming file saves.

mp4AtSelectedDestination.message: The MP4 is in the destination selected when recording started.

mp4PartsAtSelectedDestination.message: The MP4 files are saved in the selected folder as part-001, part-002, and so on.

moveRecordingHud.message: Drag to move the recording status HUD

recordingToDestination.message: Recording to the selected folder in approximately 2 GiB parts.

resolutionRolloverHud.message: Resolution changed from $FROM$ to $TO$, switched to a new file

recordingAndSavingDescription.message: Recording data is being split into approximately 2 GiB files in the selected folder.

saveFailedDescription.message: A problem occurred while writing the file.

saveStatusUnknownTitle.message: Could not confirm the save status

saveStatusUnknownDescription.message: The connection to the recording source ended before the MP4 save could be confirmed. Check the selected destination.

partiallySavedTitle.message: Saved content up to the stop point

partiallySavedDescription.message: $REASON$. Content up to the stop point has been saved to the destination selected when recording started.

savedAfterVideoEnded.message: Recording stopped when the video ended, and the MP4 was saved.

savedDescription.message: The split MP4 files were saved to the selected folder.

savedPartsAfterError.message: Recording ended. The finalized parts remain saved.

recordingStoppedAfterExtensionUpdate.message: Recording stopped because the extension was updated.

recordingStatusConnectionLost.message: The recording status connection was lost.

writeBackpressureStopped.message: Recording stopped because file writes could not keep up with the recording speed.

recordingFileFinalizeFailed.message: Could not finalize the recording file.

nextRecordingFileCreateFailed.message: Could not create the next recording file.

recordingFileSaveFailed.message: Could not save the recording file.

restoreSaveStatusUnknown.message: The extension restarted before the MP4 save could be confirmed.

completionVideoEnded.message: Recording stopped when the video ended, and the MP4 was saved.

completionVideoRemoved.message: Stopped automatically because the selected video was removed from the page. Content up to the stop point has been saved.

completionResolutionChanged.message: Stopped automatically because the video resolution changed. Content up to the stop point has been saved.

completionSourceClosed.message: Stopped automatically because the recording source was closed. Content up to the stop point has been saved.

completionDefault.message: Recording stopped, and the MP4 was saved.

stoppedAfterNoDataTimeout.message: Stopped automatically because no recording data arrived. Content up to the stop point has been saved.

stopReasonResolutionChanged.message: Stopped automatically because the video resolution changed

stopReasonResolutionChangedWithDetails.message: Stopped automatically because the video resolution changed from $FROM$ to $TO$

stopReasonSourceClosed.message: The source page or stream was closed

stopReasonVideoRemoved.message: Stopped automatically because the selected video was removed from the page

stopReasonUnsupported.message: The browser does not support this recording method

stopReasonWriteFailed.message: Could not write to the file

stopReasonNoDataTimeout.message: Stopped automatically because no recording data arrived
